parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'processing', stage: 'queued', message: 'Video is being processed.', url: $json.url, platform: $json.platform, lang: $json.lang_name, job_id: $json.job_id, error_message: null, updated_at: $json.updated_at || new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.command:
=CHAT_ID="{{ $('Validate URL').first().json.chatId }}"
PLATFORM="{{ $('Validate URL').first().json.platform }}"
URL="{{ $('Validate URL').first().json.url }}"
WD="{{ $('Validate URL').first().json.work_dir }}"
mkdir -p /media/dub/web_status
cat > "/media/dub/web_status/${CHAT_ID}.json" <<JSON
{"job_id":"${CHAT_ID}","status":"processing","stage":"downloading","error_message":null,"updated_at":"$(date -Iseconds)","url":"${URL}","platform":"${PLATFORM}"}
JSON
mkdir -p "$WD"

run_cmd() {
  if command -v timeout >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    timeout -k 20 300 "$@"
  else
    "$@"
  fi
}

YT=""
for candidate in /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp-latest /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp $(command -v yt-dlp 2>/dev/null); do
  if [ -n "$candidate" ] && [ -x "$candidate" ]; then
    YT="$candidate"
    break
  fi
done

if [ -z "$YT" ]; then
  if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    curl --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 60 -fsSL https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp -o /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp-latest || true
    chmod +x /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp-latest 2>/dev/null || true
    [ -x /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp-latest ] && YT=/usr/local/bin/yt-dlp-latest
  fi
fi

if [ -z "$YT" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: yt-dlp binary not available"
  exit 1
fi

echo "YT_DLP_BIN=$YT"
$YT --version 2>/dev/null || true
COOKIES="/media/dub/cookies.txt"
COMMON_OUT=(-o "$WD/source.%(ext)s" --merge-output-format mp4)
SUBS=(--write-auto-sub --sub-lang en --convert-subs srt)

case "$PLATFORM" in
  youtube)
    if [ -f "$COOKIES" ]; then
      run_cmd "$YT" --js-runtimes deno --remote-components ejs:github --cookies "$COOKIES" --extractor-args "youtube:player_client=web" -f "bv[height>=1080]+ba/bv[height>=720]+ba/bv*+ba/b" --format-sort "res:1080,ext:mp4:m4a" "${SUBS[@]}" "${COMMON_OUT[@]}" "$URL" 2>&1
    fi
    if [ ! -f "$WD/source.mp4" ]; then
      run_cmd "$YT" --js-runtimes deno --remote-components ejs:github --extractor-args "youtube:player_client=web" -f "bv*+ba/b" --format-sort "res:1080,ext:mp4:m4a" "${SUBS[@]}" "${COMMON_OUT[@]}" "$URL" 2>&1
    fi
    if [ ! -f "$WD/source.mp4" ]; then
      run_cmd "$YT" --js-runtimes deno --remote-components ejs:github --extractor-args "youtube:player_client=ios" -f "bv*+ba/b" --format-sort "res:1080,ext:mp4:m4a" "${SUBS[@]}" "${COMMON_OUT[@]}" "$URL" 2>&1
    fi
    ;;
  tiktok)
    run_cmd "$YT" -f "best[ext=mp4]/best" --format-sort "res:1080" "${COMMON_OUT[@]}" "$URL" 2>&1
    if [ ! -f "$WD/source.mp4" ]; then
      run_cmd "$YT" --user-agent "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 17_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/17.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1" -f "best" "${COMMON_OUT[@]}" "$URL" 2>&1
    fi
    ;;
  xiaohongshu)
    run_cmd "$YT" -f "best" "${COMMON_OUT[@]}" "$URL" 2>&1
    if [ ! -f "$WD/source.mp4" ]; then
      run_cmd "$YT" --user-agent "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" -f "best" "${COMMON_OUT[@]}" "$URL" 2>&1
    fi
    ;;
  *)
    echo "ERROR: Unsupported platform: $PLATFORM"
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

if [ ! -f "$WD/source.mp4" ]; then
  OTHER=$(find "$WD" -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name "*.webm" -o -name "*.mkv" -o -name "*.mp4.*" \) | head -1)
  [ -n "$OTHER" ] && ffmpeg -y -i "$OTHER" -c copy "$WD/source.mp4" 2>&1 && rm -f "$OTHER"
fi
if [ ! -f "$WD/source.mp4" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: source.mp4 not found"
  ls -lh "$WD/"
  exit 1
fi
WIDTH=$(ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=width -of csv=p=0 "$WD/source.mp4" 2>/dev/null)
HEIGHT=$(ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=height -of csv=p=0 "$WD/source.mp4" 2>/dev/null)
DURATION=$(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$WD/source.mp4" 2>/dev/null)
echo "RESOLUTION=${WIDTH}x${HEIGHT}"
echo "DURATION=${DURATION}"
echo "PLATFORM=${PLATFORM}"
SRT_FILE=$(find "$WD" -name "*.srt" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
if [ -n "$SRT_FILE" ]; then cp "$SRT_FILE" "$WD/source.srt"; echo "SRT_FOUND=true"; else echo "SRT_FOUND=false"; fi
ls -lh "$WD/"

=WD="{{$('Validate URL').first().json.work_dir}}"
JOB_ID="{{$('Validate URL').first().json.job_id}}"
export JOB_ID
mkdir -p /media/dub/web_status
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os, datetime
with open(f"/media/dub/web_status/{os.environ['JOB_ID']}.json", 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    json.dump({'job_id': os.environ['JOB_ID'], 'status': 'processing', 'stage': 'transcribing', 'error_message': None, 'updated_at': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + 'Z'}, f, ensure_ascii=False)
PY

echo "=== Extracting audio ==="
ffmpeg -y -i "$WD/source.mp4" -vn -acodec pcm_s16le -ar 16000 -ac 1 "$WD/audio.wav" 2>&1

if ! which whisper > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  pip install -U openai-whisper --break-system-packages 2>&1 | tail -3
fi
MODEL="small"
WHISPER_CACHE="${HOME}/.cache/whisper"
if [ -f "$WHISPER_CACHE/large-v3.pt" ]; then MODEL="large-v3"; elif [ -f "$WHISPER_CACHE/medium.pt" ]; then MODEL="medium"; fi
whisper "$WD/audio.wav" --model "$MODEL" --output_dir "$WD" --output_format all --word_timestamps True 2>&1
if [ ! -f "$WHISPER_CACHE/large-v3.pt" ]; then nohup python3 -c "import whisper; whisper.load_model('large-v3')" > /dev/null 2>&1 & fi
SRT_FILE="$WD/audio.srt"
if [ -s "$SRT_FILE" ]; then
  python3 -c "import re
corrections={'[音乐]':'','[Music]':'','[music]':'','[Applause]':'','[applause]':'','[Laughter]':'','[laughter]':'','♪':'','♫':''}
content=open('$SRT_FILE','r',encoding='utf-8').read()
for wrong,right in corrections.items(): content=content.replace(wrong,right)
blocks=content.strip().split('\n\n')
clean=[]
for block in blocks:
 lines=block.strip().split('\n')
 if len(lines)>=3:
  text='\n'.join(lines[2:]).strip()
  if text: clean.append(block)
 elif len(lines)>=2:
  clean.append(block)
open('$SRT_FILE','w',encoding='utf-8').write('\n\n'.join(clean))
print('Dictionary correction applied')" 2>&1
  echo "=== TRANSCRIPT_START ==="
  cat "$SRT_FILE"
  echo ""
  echo "=== TRANSCRIPT_END ==="
else
  echo "SRT_FOUND=false"
  echo "ERROR: No transcript output from Whisper"
fi
ls -la "$WD/"
echo "DONE_TRANSCRIBE"

values.content:
=SYSTEM: You are a dubbing translator and SEO expert. Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown fences, no explanation.

TARGET LANGUAGE: {{ $('Validate URL').first().json.lang_name }}

TASK 1 - DUBBING-AWARE TRANSLATION:
You receive a JSON array of subtitle texts. Return a JSON array of translations with EXACTLY the same length.

RULES:
- Output array length MUST EXACTLY match input array length.
- Translate for SPOKEN dubbing, not literal subtitles.
- Prefer short, natural, everyday phrasing.
- Keep each line similar or shorter in spoken duration than the original.
- Avoid formal or wordy phrasing unless the original is formal.
- Avoid filler words, repeated honorifics, and unnecessary particles.
- Do NOT merge or skip lines.
- If a line would sound too long, shorten it while preserving meaning.
- Keep numbers, brand names, and proper nouns understandable when spoken.

TASK 2 - SEO METADATA:
Generate SEO metadata in {{ $('Validate URL').first().json.lang_name }}.

RETURN THIS EXACT JSON STRUCTURE:
{"translated_texts":["line1","line2"],"seo":{"title":"SEO title (60 chars max)","description":"SEO description (160 chars max)","tags":["tag1","tag2","tag3","tag4","tag5"],"hashtags":["#hashtag1","#hashtag2","#hashtag3","#hashtag4","#hashtag5"],"youtube":{"title":"YouTube title","description":"YouTube description (500 chars max)","tags":["yt1","yt2","yt3"]},"tiktok":{"caption":"TikTok caption with hashtags (150 chars max)"},"facebook":{"text":"Facebook post (250 chars max)"}}}

SUBTITLE TEXTS TO TRANSLATE ({{ $json.block_count }} lines):
{{ $json.texts_json }}

parameters.command:
=WD="{{ $json.work_dir }}"
VOICE="{{ $json.vo_voice }}"
DURATION="{{ $json.duration }}"
JOB_ID="{{ $json.job_id || $('Validate URL').first().json.job_id }}"
export JOB_ID
mkdir -p /media/dub/web_status
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os, datetime
path = f"/media/dub/web_status/{os.environ['JOB_ID']}.json"
with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    json.dump({'job_id': os.environ['JOB_ID'], 'status': 'processing', 'stage': 'generating_voice', 'error_message': None, 'updated_at': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + 'Z'}, f, ensure_ascii=False)
PY

echo "=== Writing Burmese SRT ==="
echo '{{ $json.burmese_srt_b64 }}' | base64 -d > "$WD/burmese.srt"
if [ ! -s "$WD/burmese.srt" ]; then echo "ERROR: SRT is empty or invalid"; exit 1; fi
cat > "$WD/async_tts_mix.py" << 'PYTHON_SCRIPT'
import asyncio, datetime, json, os, re, subprocess, sys
MAX_SPEEDUP = 1.18
MIN_GAP = 0.08
MIN_SLOT = 0.22

def parse_ts(value):
    m = re.match(r'(\d{2}):(\d{2}):(\d{2})[,.](\d{3})', value)
    if not m:
        return 0.0
    h, mi, s, ms = map(int, m.groups())
    return h * 3600 + mi * 60 + s + ms / 1000.0

def parse_srt(path):
    content = open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8').read().strip()
    items = []
    for idx, block in enumerate(re.split(r'\n\n+', content)):
        lines = [line.strip() for line in block.splitlines() if line.strip()]
        if len(lines) < 2:
            continue
        ts_idx = next((i for i, line in enumerate(lines) if '-->' in line), -1)
        if ts_idx < 0:
            continue
        start_s, end_s = [part.strip() for part in lines[ts_idx].split('-->')]
        text = ' '.join(lines[ts_idx + 1:]).strip()
        if text:
            items.append({'index': idx, 'text': text, 'original_start': parse_ts(start_s), 'original_end': parse_ts(end_s)})
    return items

def ffprobe_duration(path):
    try:
        out = subprocess.check_output(['ffprobe', '-v', 'error', '-show_entries', 'format=duration', '-of', 'csv=p=0', path], text=True, timeout=15).strip()
        return float(out or 0)
    except Exception:
        return 0.0

async def gen_tts(text, voice, out_path, retries=3):
    for _ in range(retries):
        proc = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec('edge-tts', '--voice', voice, '--pitch', '+0Hz', '--rate', '+0%', '--text', text, '--write-media', out_path, stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE, stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE)
        await proc.communicate()
        if proc.returncode == 0 and os.path.exists(out_path) and os.path.getsize(out_path) > 0:
            return True
        await asyncio.sleep(0.6)
    return False

def render_segment(src, dst, speedup):
    filters = []
    ratio = max(1.0, speedup)
    while ratio > 2.0:
        filters.append('atempo=2.0')
        ratio /= 2.0
    filters.append(f'atempo={ratio:.4f}')
    result = subprocess.run(['ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', src, '-af', ','.join(filters), '-ar', '24000', '-ac', '1', dst], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60)
    if result.returncode != 0 or not os.path.exists(dst):
        raise RuntimeError(result.stderr[-400:])
    return ffprobe_duration(dst)

def write_status(wd, stage, status='processing', error_message=None):
    with open(f"/media/dub/web_status/{os.path.basename(wd)}.json", 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        json.dump({'job_id': os.path.basename(wd), 'status': status, 'stage': stage, 'error_message': error_message, 'updated_at': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + 'Z'}, f, ensure_ascii=False)

async def main(wd, voice, video_dur):
    entries = parse_srt(os.path.join(wd, 'burmese.srt'))
    if not entries:
        raise RuntimeError('No entries in SRT')
    write_status(wd, 'generating_voice')
    raw_dir = os.path.join(wd, 'tts_raw'); proc_dir = os.path.join(wd, 'tts_proc')
    os.makedirs(raw_dir, exist_ok=True); os.makedirs(proc_dir, exist_ok=True)
    usable = []
    skipped = []
    for entry in entries:
        raw_path = os.path.join(raw_dir, f"line_{entry['index']:04d}.mp3")
        ok = await gen_tts(entry['text'], voice, raw_path)
        if not ok:
            skipped.append({'index': entry['index'], 'text': entry['text'], 'reason': 'tts_failed'})
            continue
        entry['raw_path'] = raw_path
        entry['tts_duration'] = ffprobe_duration(raw_path)
        if entry['tts_duration'] <= 0:
            skipped.append({'index': entry['index'], 'text': entry['text'], 'reason': 'invalid_duration'})
            continue
        usable.append(entry)
    if not usable:
        raise RuntimeError('All TTS lines failed')
    cursor = 0.0; debug = []; processed = []
    for i, entry in enumerate(usable):
        slot = max(entry['original_end'] - entry['original_start'], MIN_SLOT)
        next_start = usable[i + 1]['original_start'] if i + 1 < len(usable) else video_dur
        adjusted_start = max(entry['original_start'], cursor)
        remaining = max(MIN_SLOT, next_start - adjusted_start - MIN_GAP)
        target_duration = max(MIN_SLOT, min(slot, remaining))
        desired_speedup = entry['tts_duration'] / max(target_duration, MIN_SLOT)
        speedup = min(MAX_SPEEDUP, max(1.0, desired_speedup))
        proc_path = os.path.join(proc_dir, f"line_{entry['index']:04d}.wav")
        processed_duration = render_segment(entry['raw_path'], proc_path, speedup)
        adjusted_end = adjusted_start + processed_duration
        if adjusted_end > video_dur:
            overshoot = adjusted_end - video_dur
            adjusted_start = max(0.0, adjusted_start - overshoot)
            adjusted_end = adjusted_start + processed_duration
        cursor = adjusted_end + MIN_GAP
        processed.append({'path': proc_path, 'start': adjusted_start})
        debug.append({'text': entry['text'], 'original_start': round(entry['original_start'], 3), 'original_end': round(entry['original_end'], 3), 'slot_duration': round(slot, 3), 'tts_duration': round(entry['tts_duration'], 3), 'adjusted_start': round(adjusted_start, 3), 'adjusted_end': round(adjusted_end, 3), 'speedup': round(speedup, 4)})
    for skipped_entry in skipped:
        debug.append({'text': skipped_entry['text'], 'original_start': None, 'original_end': None, 'slot_duration': None, 'tts_duration': None, 'adjusted_start': None, 'adjusted_end': None, 'speedup': None, 'skipped_reason': skipped_entry['reason']})
    debug_path = os.path.join(wd, 'timing_debug.json')
    with open(debug_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        json.dump(debug, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
    inputs = []; filters = []
    for i, seg in enumerate(processed):
        inputs.extend(['-i', seg['path']])
        delay_ms = max(0, int(seg['start'] * 1000))
        filters.append(f'[{i}:a]adelay={delay_ms}|{delay_ms},apad[d{i}]')
    mix_inputs = ''.join(f'[d{i}]' for i in range(len(processed)))
    filters.append(f'{mix_inputs}amix=inputs={len(processed)}:duration=longest:dropout_transition=0:normalize=0[m]')
    filters.append(f'[m]atrim=0:{video_dur:.3f}[out]')
    raw_mix = os.path.join(wd, 'vo_mixed_raw.wav'); final_out = os.path.join(wd, 'vo_full.mp3')
    mix = subprocess.run(['ffmpeg', '-y', *inputs, '-filter_complex', ';'.join(filters), '-map', '[out]', '-ar', '24000', '-ac', '1', raw_mix], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=240)
    if mix.returncode != 0:
        raise RuntimeError('Mix failed: ' + mix.stderr[-500:])
    norm = subprocess.run(['ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', raw_mix, '-af', 'loudnorm=I=-16:TP=-1.5:LRA=11', '-ar', '44100', '-ac', '1', '-b:a', '192k', final_out], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=120)
    if norm.returncode != 0 or not os.path.exists(final_out):
        raise RuntimeError('Loudnorm output failed: ' + norm.stderr[-500:])
    for folder in (raw_dir, proc_dir):
        for name in os.listdir(folder):
            try:
                os.remove(os.path.join(folder, name))
            except OSError:
                pass
    print('TIMING_DEBUG=' + debug_path)
    print('VO_DURATION=' + str(round(ffprobe_duration(final_out), 3)))
    print('VO_READY=true')

asyncio.run(main(sys.argv[1], sys.argv[2], float(sys.argv[3])))
PYTHON_SCRIPT
python3 "$WD/async_tts_mix.py" "$WD" "$VOICE" "$DURATION" 2>&1
if [ ! -s "$WD/vo_full.mp3" ]; then echo "ERROR: vo_full.mp3 not created"; exit 1; fi

=WD="{{ $('Build FFmpeg Plan').first().json.work_dir }}"
JOB_ID="{{ $('Build FFmpeg Plan').first().json.job_id || $('Validate URL').first().json.job_id }}"
export JOB_ID
mkdir -p /media/dub/web_status /media/dub/output
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os, datetime
path = f"/media/dub/web_status/{os.environ['JOB_ID']}.json"
with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    json.dump({'job_id': os.environ['JOB_ID'], 'status': 'processing', 'stage': 'rendering', 'error_message': None, 'updated_at': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + 'Z'}, f, ensure_ascii=False)
PY

echo "=== Mixing VO + Rendering Final ==="
if [ ! -s "$WD/vo_full.mp3" ]; then echo "ERROR: vo_full.mp3 missing"; exit 1; fi
if [ ! -s "$WD/source.mp4" ]; then echo "ERROR: source.mp4 missing"; exit 1; fi
VIDEO_DUR=$(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$WD/source.mp4" 2>/dev/null)
VO_DUR=$(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$WD/vo_full.mp3" 2>/dev/null)
echo "VIDEO: ${VIDEO_DUR}s | VO: ${VO_DUR}s"
ffmpeg -y -i "$WD/source.mp4" -i "$WD/vo_full.mp3" -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 -c:v libx264 -preset medium -crf 20 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -b:a 192k -movflags +faststart -shortest "$WD/final.mp4" 2>&1 | tail -5
if [ ! -s "$WD/final.mp4" ]; then echo "ERROR: final.mp4 not created"; exit 1; fi
FINAL_DUR=$(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$WD/final.mp4" 2>/dev/null)
SIZE=$(du -h "$WD/final.mp4" | cut -f1)
cp "$WD/final.mp4" "/media/dub/output/${JOB_ID}.mp4"
echo "FINAL=$WD/final.mp4"
echo "OUTPUT_COPY=/media/dub/output/${JOB_ID}.mp4"
echo "DURATION=${FINAL_DUR}s | SIZE=${SIZE}"

=WD="{{ $('Validate URL').first().json.work_dir }}"
PLATFORM="{{ $('Validate URL').first().json.platform }}"
URL="{{ $('Validate URL').first().json.url }}"
LANG="{{ $('Validate URL').first().json.lang_name || 'Burmese' }}"
USER_TOKEN="{{ $('Validate URL').first().json.userToken || '' }}"
JOB_ID=$(basename "$WD")
SEO_JSON='{{ JSON.stringify($("Build FFmpeg Plan").first().json.seo || {}) }}'
BLUR_STDOUT='{{ JSON.stringify($("Apply Caption Blur").first().json.stdout || "") }}'
mkdir -p /media/dub/web_status /media/dub/output
cp "$WD/final.mp4" "/media/dub/output/${JOB_ID}.mp4" 2>/dev/null || true
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os, datetime
seo = {}
try:
    seo = json.loads(os.environ['SEO_JSON'])
except Exception:
    seo = {}
blur_stdout = os.environ.get('BLUR_STDOUT', '')
blur_error = None
blur_state = 'ok'
if 'BLUR_FAILED=true' in blur_stdout or 'BLUR_SKIPPED=true' in blur_stdout:
    blur_state = 'failed'
    blur_error = 'Caption blur skipped; keeping unblurred final video'
status = {
    'job_id': os.environ['JOB_ID'],
    'status': 'processing',
    'stage': 'publishing',
    'error_message': blur_error,
    'updated_at': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + 'Z',
    'platform': os.environ['PLATFORM'],
    'source_url': os.environ['URL'],
    'lang': os.environ['LANG'],
    'blur_status': blur_state,
}
if seo:
    status['seo'] = seo
with open(f"/media/dub/web_status/{os.environ['JOB_ID']}.json", 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    json.dump(status, f, ensure_ascii=False)
PY

echo "Status: publishing | Job: ${JOB_ID}"

=JOB_ID="{{ $json.job_id || $('Validate URL').first().json.job_id }}"
STAGE="{{ $json.stage || $('Check Result').first().json.stage || 'failed' }}"
ERROR_B64="{{ Buffer.from((($json.error_message || $('Check Result').first().json.error_message || 'Unknown error') + '').replace(/[\r\n]+/g, ' ').slice(0, 1500), 'utf8').toString('base64') }}"
export JOB_ID STAGE ERROR_B64
mkdir -p /media/dub/web_status
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json, os, datetime
error_message = None
if os.environ.get('ERROR_B64'):
    error_message = base64.b64decode(os.environ['ERROR_B64']).decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
with open(f"/media/dub/web_status/{os.environ['JOB_ID']}.json", 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    json.dump({
        'job_id': os.environ['JOB_ID'],
        'status': 'failed',
        'stage': os.environ['STAGE'],
        'error_message': error_message,
        'updated_at': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + 'Z',
    }, f, ensure_ascii=False)
print('Error status written')
PY

=JOB_ID_RAW="{{ $json.query.job_id || '' }}"
JOB_ID=$(printf '%s' "$JOB_ID_RAW" | tr -cd 'A-Za-z0-9_-')
if [ -n "$JOB_ID" ] && [ -f "/media/dub/web_status/${JOB_ID}.json" ]; then
  cat "/media/dub/web_status/${JOB_ID}.json"
else
  python3 - <<'PY'
import json, datetime, os
print(json.dumps({
  'job_id': os.environ.get('JOB_ID', ''),
  'status': 'processing',
  'stage': 'queued',
  'error_message': None,
  'updated_at': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + 'Z'
}, ensure_ascii=False))
PY
fi

parameters.content:
## 🌐 Website Input
Webhook receives video URL from website form
Validates URL → returns job_id for polling

## 🎬 Video Serve
Website requests video by job_id → SSH downloads → serves binary mp4

parameters.command:
=mkdir -p /media/dub/tiktok
TOKEN_DATA='{{ JSON.stringify($json || {}) }}'
echo "$TOKEN_DATA" > /media/dub/tiktok/token.json
ACCESS=$(echo "$TOKEN_DATA" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('access_token',''))" 2>/dev/null)
REFRESH=$(echo "$TOKEN_DATA" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('refresh_token',''))" 2>/dev/null)
OPEN_ID=$(echo "$TOKEN_DATA" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('open_id',''))" 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$ACCESS" ] && [ "$ACCESS" != "None" ]; then
  echo "TOKEN_SAVED=true"
  echo "OPEN_ID=$OPEN_ID"
  echo "EXPIRES=$(echo "$TOKEN_DATA" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('expires_in',''))" 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "TOKEN_SAVED=false"
  echo "ERROR: No access token in response"
fi

={{ (() => {
  const workDir = $('Validate URL').first().json.work_dir;
  const script = [
    'WD="' + workDir + '"',
    'JOB_ID=$(basename "$WD")',
    'TOKEN_FILE="/media/dub/tiktok/token.json"',
    '',
    'if [ ! -f "$TOKEN_FILE" ]; then',
    '  echo "TIKTOK_SKIP=true"',
    '  echo "No TikTok token found. Skipping TikTok publish."',
    '  exit 0',
    'fi',
    '',
    'ACCESS_TOKEN=$(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open(\'$TOKEN_FILE\')); print(d.get(\'access_token\',\'\'))" 2>/dev/null)',
    'if [ -z "$ACCESS_TOKEN" ] || [ "$ACCESS_TOKEN" = "None" ]; then',
    '  echo "TIKTOK_SKIP=true"',
    '  echo "Invalid token. Skipping."',
    '  exit 0',
    'fi',
    '',
    'FINAL="/media/dub/output/$JOB_ID.mp4"',
    'if [ ! -f "$FINAL" ]; then',
    '  FINAL="$WD/final.mp4"',
    'fi',
    'if [ ! -f "$FINAL" ]; then',
    '  echo "TIKTOK_ERROR=true"',
    '  echo "No final video found"',
    '  exit 0',
    'fi',
    '',
    'FILE_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$FINAL" 2>/dev/null)',
    'echo "Video: $FINAL ($FILE_SIZE bytes)"',
    'echo "=== Uploading to TikTok ==="',
    '',
    'INIT_PAYLOAD=\'{"source_info":{"source":"FILE_UPLOAD","video_size":' + '"$FILE_SIZE"' + ',"chunk_size":' + '"$FILE_SIZE"' + ',"total_chunk_count":1}' + '}\'',
    'INIT_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "https://open.tiktokapis.com/v2/post/publish/inbox/video/init/" -H "Authorization: Bearer $ACCESS_TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "$INIT_PAYLOAD")',
    'echo "Init response: $INIT_RESP"',
    '',
    'UPLOAD_URL=$(echo "$INIT_RESP" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\'data\',{}).get(\'upload_url\',\'\'))" 2>/dev/null)',
    'PUBLISH_ID=$(echo "$INIT_RESP" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\'data\',{}).get(\'publish_id\',\'\'))" 2>/dev/null)',
    '',
    'if [ -z "$UPLOAD_URL" ] || [ "$UPLOAD_URL" = "None" ]; then',
    '  echo "TIKTOK_ERROR=true"',
    '  echo "Failed to get upload URL"',
    '  exit 0',
    'fi',
    '',
    'echo "Uploading to: $UPLOAD_URL"',
    'LAST_BYTE=$((FILE_SIZE-1))',
    'UPLOAD_RESP=$(curl -s -X PUT "$UPLOAD_URL" -H "Content-Type: video/mp4" -H "Content-Range: bytes 0-$LAST_BYTE/$FILE_SIZE" --data-binary "@$FINAL")',
    'echo "Upload response: $UPLOAD_RESP"',
    'echo "TIKTOK_DONE=true"',
    'echo "PUBLISH_ID=$PUBLISH_ID"'
  ].join('\n');
  return 'echo ' + Buffer.from(script, 'utf8').toString('base64') + ' | base64 -d | bash';
})() }}

parameters.content:
## 🎵 TikTok OAuth
Auth code exchange → save token → auto-publish videos

parameters.command:
=WD="{{ $('Build FFmpeg Plan').first().json.work_dir }}"
JOB_ID=$(basename "$WD")
mkdir -p /media/dub/web_status
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os, datetime
with open(f"/media/dub/web_status/{os.environ['JOB_ID']}.json", 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    json.dump({'job_id': os.environ['JOB_ID'], 'status': 'processing', 'stage': 'blurring', 'error_message': None, 'updated_at': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + 'Z'}, f, ensure_ascii=False)
PY

echo "=== Starting Caption Blur ==="
if [ ! -s "$WD/final.mp4" ]; then
  echo "BLUR_FAILED=true"
  echo "BLUR_ERROR=No final.mp4 found"
  exit 0
fi
DURATION=$(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$WD/final.mp4" 2>/dev/null)
HALF=$(python3 -c "print(f'{float(\"$DURATION\")/2:.2f}')")
RESOLUTION=$(ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=width,height -of csv=p=0 "$WD/final.mp4" 2>/dev/null)
WIDTH=$(echo "$RESOLUTION" | cut -d',' -f1)
HEIGHT=$(echo "$RESOLUTION" | cut -d',' -f2)
ffmpeg -y -ss "$HALF" -i "$WD/final.mp4" -vframes 1 -q:v 2 "$WD/blur_frame.jpg" 2>/dev/null
if [ ! -s "$WD/blur_frame.jpg" ]; then
  echo "BLUR_FAILED=true"
  echo "BLUR_ERROR=Frame extraction failed"
  exit 0
fi
cat > "$WD/blur_request.json" << BJSON
{"width":$WIDTH,"height":$HEIGHT,"frame_path":"$WD/blur_frame.jpg","source":"$WD/final.mp4","job_id":"$JOB_ID","duration":"$DURATION"}
BJSON
echo "BLUR_READY=true"
echo "FRAME=$WD/blur_frame.jpg"
echo "WIDTH=$WIDTH"
echo "HEIGHT=$HEIGHT"

=WD="{{ $('Build FFmpeg Plan').first().json.work_dir }}"
JOB_ID=$(basename "$WD")
GEMINI_RAW='{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}'
echo "=== Applying Caption Blur ==="
REGIONS=$(python3 -c "import json,re
raw='''$GEMINI_RAW'''
text=''
try:
 d=json.loads(raw)
 if 'content' in d and 'parts' in d['content']:
  text=d['content']['parts'][0].get('text','')
 elif 'candidates' in d:
  text=d['candidates'][0]['content']['parts'][0].get('text','')
 else:
  text=raw
except Exception:
 text=raw
text=re.sub(r'```json\n?', '', text)
text=re.sub(r'```\n?', '', text)
m=re.search(r'\{[\s\S]*\}', text)
if m:
 parsed=json.loads(m.group())
 regions=parsed.get('regions', [])
 print(json.dumps(regions) if regions else 'NONE')
else:
 print('NONE')" 2>/dev/null)
if [ "$REGIONS" = "NONE" ] || [ -z "$REGIONS" ]; then
  echo "BLUR_SKIPPED=true"
  echo "BLUR_ERROR=No caption regions found"
  exit 0
fi
FILTER=$(python3 -c "import json
regions=json.loads('''$REGIONS''')
width=int('{{ $('Read Blur Info').first().json.width }}')
height=int('{{ $('Read Blur Info').first().json.height }}')
parts=[]
prev='[0:v]'
for i,r in enumerate(regions):
 x=max(0,min(int(r['x']), width-1)); y=max(0,min(int(r['y']), height-1))
 w=max(1,min(int(r['w']), width-x)); h=max(1,min(int(r['h']), height-y))
 tag=f'[blur{i}]'
 parts.append(f'{prev}split[main{i}][copy{i}]')
 parts.append(f'[copy{i}]crop={w}:{h}:{x}:{y},boxblur=30:10[blurred{i}]')
 parts.append(f'[main{i}][blurred{i}]overlay={x}:{y}{tag}')
 prev=tag
print(';'.join(parts)); print(prev)")
FILTER_STR=$(echo "$FILTER" | head -1)
LAST_TAG=$(echo "$FILTER" | tail -1)
ffmpeg -y -i "$WD/final.mp4" -filter_complex "$FILTER_STR" -map "$LAST_TAG" -map 0:a? -c:v libx264 -preset fast -crf 20 -c:a copy "$WD/blurred.mp4" 2>&1 | tail -5
if [ -s "$WD/blurred.mp4" ]; then
  mv "$WD/blurred.mp4" "$WD/final.mp4"
  cp "$WD/final.mp4" "/media/dub/output/${JOB_ID}.mp4" 2>/dev/null || true
  echo "BLUR_DONE=true"
else
  echo "BLUR_FAILED=true"
  echo "BLUR_ERROR=ffmpeg blur render failed"
fi

=JOB_ID="{{ $('Validate URL').first().json.job_id }}"
export JOB_ID
mkdir -p /media/dub/web_status
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os, datetime
with open(f"/media/dub/web_status/{os.environ['JOB_ID']}.json", 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    json.dump({
        'job_id': os.environ['JOB_ID'],
        'status': 'processing',
        'stage': 'translating',
        'error_message': None,
        'updated_at': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + 'Z',
    }, f, ensure_ascii=False)
PY

echo "TRANSLATE_STATUS=OK"

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ job_id: $json.job_id, status: 'failed', stage: 'done', error_message: $json.error_message || 'Final video not found', updated_at: $json.updated_at || new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.command:
=JOB_ID="{{ $json.job_id }}"
STAGE="{{ $json.stage }}"
ERROR_MSG="{{ (($json.error_message || '') + '').replace(/[\r\n]+/g, ' ').slice(0, 1500) }}"
mkdir -p /media/dub/web_status
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os, datetime
path = f"/media/dub/web_status/{os.environ['JOB_ID']}.json"
try:
    current = json.load(open(path, encoding='utf-8'))
except Exception:
    current = {'job_id': os.environ['JOB_ID']}
current['job_id'] = os.environ['JOB_ID']
current['status'] = 'done'
current['stage'] = os.environ['STAGE']
current['error_message'] = os.environ['ERROR_MSG'] or None
current['updated_at'] = datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + 'Z'
with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    json.dump(current, f, ensure_ascii=False)
print('Publish status written')
PY

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json || {};
return [{ json: { job_id: $('Validate URL').first().json.job_id, stage: 'transcribe_failed', error_message: String(item.error || 'Transcript parsing failed') } }];

const item = $input.first().json || {};
return [{ json: { job_id: $('Validate URL').first().json.job_id, stage: 'translate_failed', error_message: String(item.error || 'Translation/build plan failed') } }];
